summary: Tested all 10 features for InkBook iteration 15 - Dashboard improvements for live time-based appointment management. All features verified working correctly. Created test seed data (past confirmed booking Apr 14) to fully test Abgeschlossen badge, Bewerten flow, and studio past bookings.

issues: 'Abgeschlossen' text appears twice for past confirmed bookings: once as the status badge (via statusConfig mapping) and once as the explicit completed-badge span. Minor duplicate display but both have data-testid correctly set.

action_items: Minor: CustomerDashboard shows 'Abgeschlossen' badge twice for past confirmed bookings (status pill + explicit completed-badge). Consider removing duplicate or keeping only one.
critical_code_review_comments: All 10 features correctly implemented and verified
CustomerDashboard: isBookingPast() helper correctly uses now > new Date(`${b.date}T${b.end_time}:00`)
CustomerDashboard: Umbuchen/Absagen hidden for isPast bookings (line 470, 478)
CustomerDashboard: Abgeschlossen badge renders for isPast && confirmed (line 489-494)
CustomerDashboard: Bewerten button: isPast -> opens review modal, !isPast -> shows notYetPopup (line 499-511)
StudioDashboard: Overview has Heutige Termine (green pulse) + Kommende Termine sections
StudioDashboard: Bookings tab has sub-tabs data-testid=studio-bookings-active-tab and studio-bookings-past-tab
StudioDashboard: Stornieren button for past bookings: disabled=true + cursor-not-allowed (line 509-531)
Backend: /api/dashboard/stats returns all_bookings for studio_owner (500 limit) and customer (200 limit)
Both dashboards poll every 30s via setInterval(fetchStats, 30000) and tick every 60s for re-evaluation
seed_data_creation: Created booking 'book_past_test01' in tattoo_booking.bookings for test_customer (Sophie Müller) - date:2026-04-14, end_time:12:00, status:confirmed, studio: Ink & Soul Studio. Used to test Abgeschlossen badge and Bewerten flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 15 features verified working. Test seed booking 'book_past_test01' (Apr 14 confirmed) is in DB for test_customer. CustomerDashboard correctly shows 3 tabs, Abgeschlossen badge for past confirmed, no Umbuchen/Absagen for past, Bewerten opens review modal for past and notYetPopup for upcoming. StudioDashboard shows Heutige/Kommende split in overview, Aktuelle/Vergangene sub-tabs in bookings, disabled Stornieren for past bookings.
